title: The Problem Solvers | Michael Truell at Cursor
summary: Cursor is an AI-native coding platform that helps engineers and less technical builders ship quality code through agents. Founded by Michael Truell, it has grown from 15 people to 700 employees and serves over 60% of Fortune 500 companies, partnering closely with Anthropic.
writeup: This profile covers Cursor, an AI-native coding platform that uses agents to help engineers and less technical builders ship quality code, told through founder Michael Truell. Cursor's reach signals how quickly agent-based developer tools have moved into production work: the company grew from 15 people to 700 employees and serves over 60% of Fortune 500 companies. The video notes a close partnership with Anthropic, situating Cursor within the broader ecosystem of code generation and AI agents.
